items.title: Wrexham into FA Cup last 16 for 1st time since '97
items.summary: Wrexham achieved another landmark moment in their meteoric rise after reaching the last 16 of England's FA Cup for the first time since 1997.

items.title: Hull confirm arrests over chanting vs. Chelsea
items.summary: Hull City have confirmed there were multiple arrests made for discriminatory chanting during Friday's 4-0 FA Cup fourth round defeat to Chelsea.

items.title: PSG stunned by coachless Rennes in title blow
items.summary: Coachless Rennes stunned Ligue 1 leaders Paris Saint-Germain 3-1 at home and snapped a five-game winless run on Friday.

items.title: Pulisic comes off bench as Modric gives Milan win
items.summary: Luka Modric scored a late winner for AC Milan to beat Pisa 2-1 and close the gap on Serie A leader Inter Milan to five points on Friday.

items.title: 'Marvellous' Man City set WSL standard in rampant win
items.summary: 'Marvellous' Manchester City set WSL standard in rampant 6-0 win over bottom side Leicester.

items.title: Premier League superlatives: The 25 best and worst players at different skills
items.summary: Who's the Premier League's fastest player? The slowest? Best passer? The worst? And more. Here are 25 superlatives from different skills.

items.title: 'Greedy' Wrexham dream of adding to 'incredible journey'
items.summary: Wrexham are dreaming of adding to their "incredible journey" after reaching the FA Cup fifth round for the first time in 29 years with victory over Ipswich Town.

items.title: Bosz tilt niet zwaar een discussie bij PSV: 'Dan heb je mij niet zien spelen'
items.summary: Peter Bosz wilde geen enkel punt maken van de woordenwisseling tussen Joey Veerman en Ivan Perisic vrijdagavond op het veld in Volendam. Beide spelers kregen het verbaal met elkaar aan de stok, maar volgens de oefenmeester van PSV hoort dat er soms gewoon bij. 'Dan heb je mij niet zien spelen', reageerde hij op de vraag of hij er moeite mee had dat beide spelers elkaar de waarheid vertelden.

items.title: Blaming immigrants for problems is wrong, says Pep Guardiola after Ratcliffe comments
items.summary: ‘Society is better when we embrace other cultures’ Haaland doubt for FA Cup tie, Rodri charged by FA Pep Guardiola has said that blaming people from overseas for a country’s problems is wrong, the Manchester City manager’s comments coming amid the fallout of Sir Jim Ratcliffe claiming the UK is being “colonised by immigrants”. Ratcliffe’s comment, made in an interview with Sky News on Wednesday, has led to widespread condemnation, including from within football, leading to Manchester United’s single largest minority owner saying he was sorry that his “choice of language has offended some people in the UK and Europe”. Continue reading...

items.title: Wrexham beat Ipswich to progress to FA Cup fifth round
items.summary: Wrexham book their place in the fifth round of the FA Cup for the first time in 29 years as they beat Championship rivals Ipswich Town at Stok Cae Ras.

items.title: Arne Slot insists he wants ‘vital’ Ibrahima Konaté to sign new Liverpool deal
items.summary: Defender’s current contract expires at end of the season ‘We wouldn’t be in talks if we didn’t want him to stay’ Arne Slot has described Ibrahima Konaté as “vital” to Liverpool and the club have not given up hope of convincing the defender to sign a new contract. Konaté has endured a tough time on and off the pitch this season but has impressed since returning from compassionate leave against Newcastle following the death of his father. Liverpool’s central-defensive rebuild is under way with the signings of Giovanni Leoni and Jérémy Jacquet, for an initial £26m and £55m respectively, but Slot insists Konaté remains an essential part of his plans. Continue reading...

items.title: PSV morst opvallend veel punten tegen laagvliegers
items.summary: PSV ging vrijdagavond op bezoek bij FC Volendam. De Eindhovenaren wilden de grote voorsprong weer wat uitbreiden met het oog op een extreem vroege landstitel, maar slaagden daar niet in. Lees hier alles terug.

items.title: Neto scores hat-trick as Chelsea see off Hull in FA Cup
items.summary: A Pedro Neto hat-trick fires Chelsea through to the FA Cup fifth round with a comfortable win at Championship Hull City.

items.title: PSV-trainer Bosz reageert op 'wereldgoal' Volendam: 'Dan moet je klappen'
items.summary: FC Volendam-talent Robin van Cruijsen heeft vrijdagavond een gooi gedaan naar het doelpunt van het seizoen. Ook PSV-trainer Peter Bosz kon zijn ogen niet geloven toen de jonge middenvelder de bal snoeihard in het doel volleerde. Al had hij naast lovende woorden voor Van Cruijsen ook kritiek op het spel van zijn eigen ploeg. 'Het ontbrak ons aan diepgang.'

items.title: Trotse Kruys countert Veerman: 'Van Cruijsen gaat ze nog vaker zo raken'
items.summary: FC Volendam beleefde vrijdagavond zijn vrolijkste avond van het seizoen. Aan De Dijk ging het buitenshuis nog foutloze PSV met 2-1 over de knie. Inleiding was een werkelijk formidabel doelpunt van jonkie Robin van Cruijsen. Trainer Rick Kruys denkt, in tegenstelling tot Joey Veerman , dat zijn pupil nog meer van zulke goals gaat maken.

items.title: Pedro Neto fires hat-trick as Chelsea provide Rosenior with happy return to Hull
items.summary: With sleet, snow, swirling wind from the banks of the Humber and most importantly, a Hull City side pushing hard for promotion to the Premier League this season, it was hard not to believe pre-match that this had all the makings of a difficult evening’s work for Chelsea. Liam Rosenior holds this city close to his heart, given how some of his family hail from Hull and he had an enjoyable spell in charge of the Tigers: well, until he was unceremoniously sacked nearly two years ago, that is. But his happy association with Hull continued with a magnificent display from his Chelsea side, who ultimately sauntered into the next round of the FA Cup. Continue reading...

items.title: Milan blijft in spoor van Inter ondanks oliedomme rode kaart en gemiste penalty
items.summary: AC Milan blijft in het kielzog van koploper Internazionale. Luka Modric werd vrijdagavond de reddende engel van het elftal van Massimiliano Allegri, die Niclas Füllkrug eerder in het duel een strafschop zag missen tegen Pisa.

items.title: 'Pass the parcel!' - Why are F1's big four all claiming each other are faster?
items.summary: There is always mystery at Formula 1 testing over which team actually has the fastest car, but the 2026 pre-season puzzle is shaping up as one of the most confusing and complex in the sport's history.

items.title: 'Intense, aggressive, entertaining' - what will Tudor bring to Spurs?
items.summary: After Igor Tudor agrees to take charge of Tottenham for the remainder of the season, BBC Sport takes a look at what supporters can expect to see from his side.

items.title: 'A complete performance' - Warrington secure opening-night win over St Helens
